name: Raw Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 16
Preheat oven to 325 degrees F. Grease 16 muffin tins.
Mix the apples and sugar in one bowl and set aside. In a second bowl, mix the eggs, oil, and vanilla until blended. In a third bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt and stir with a fork until combined.
Stir the egg mixture into the apple and sugar mixture, then mix thoroughly. Sprinkle the flour mixture over the apple mixture and mix well. Use your hands if needed to work the stiff batter. Add the raisins and walnuts and mix until evenly distributed. Spoon into the muffin tins.
Bake for about 25 minutes, or until a straw inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean. Serve warm. These are dense, moist and good!
